scripts.prepare:data:public: python3 scripts/build_itp_dataset.py && python3 scripts/build_citp_dataset.py && python3 scripts/sync_public_data.py
scripts.prepare:data: python3 scripts/build_itp_dataset.py && python3 scripts/build_citp_dataset.py && python3 scripts/build_killifish_dataset.py && python3 scripts/build_drosophila_dataset.py && python3 scripts/sync_public_data.py
scripts.cf:deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.cf:preview: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --branch preview
